meta.description: Triggered by VNTANA webhook when a product is sent for review. Sends a Slack notification with a link to the parts-mapper UI where the user can download/parse/rename the GLB scene tree in their browser.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, productUuid: $json.productUuid, productName: $json.productName, mapperUrl: $json.mapperUrl }) }}
